mapper.select: SELECT id, before_inv, after_inv, create_by, create_time, type FROM t_stock_change_log WHERE shop_goods_id = #{shopGoodsId} AND about_id = #{aboutId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_stock_change_log ( shop_goods_id, type, about_id, before_inv, after_inv, create_by, update_by, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{shopGoodsId}, #{type}, #{aboutId}, #{beforeInv}, #{afterInv}, #{createBy}, #{updateBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime} )
